ogTitle: Upper Main Arm vs Upper Mangrove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Main Arm and Upper Mangrove.
heading: Upper Main Arm vs Upper Mangrove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Main Arm, New South Wales and Upper Mangrove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Mangrove has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Upper Main Arm (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Main Arm or Upper Mangrove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Main Arm has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Upper Mangrove scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Main Arm scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Mangrove scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Main Arm or Upper Mangrove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Mangrove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
